summary: Frontend e2e testing of Sagarmatha College ERP HOD surface. All requested flows pass: HOD login redirects to /staff/home/; dashboard renders all 8 cards with real (non-zero) numeric counts (Clearance=1, Library=2, LeaveBalance=0, LeaveRequest=2, OptionalHoliday=288, Kaaj/Tour=2, StoreReq=2, Substitute=1); the BS 2083 to 2084 Nepali calendar with Holidays / Optional Holidays tabs and devanagari rows is intact and NOT broken; Modules dropdown (#modulesDropdown) opens and lists all 8 entries (Self Service, Pre Admissions, Admissions, Examination, Human Resource, Attendance, Inventory, Library); every Module page and Self Service page returns HTTP 200; Pre Admissions add inquiry+promote moved the row to /modules/admissions/; Inventory add item creates row and shows Low Stock badge for qty<reorder_level; Examination scheduling creates a new exam row; Payslip generate creates a new payslip row with 'Payslip generated' message; Logout returns to login page. All 30 unique navigation links found on the HOD dashboard returned 200 - zero broken links.

issues: Pill row uses very low-contrast border-only buttons on white background; clickable but visually subtle (cosmetic only, not blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: module_views.py mutates request.POST in pre_admissions/admissions via request.POST.copy() + reassignment - works but is non-idiomatic. Prefer passing forced stage as a kwarg to _save_admission_from_post(stage='inquiry').
No @login_required decorators on module_views.py views; access is gated only by LoginCheckMiddleWare. Acceptable since middleware enforces auth, but adding @login_required would be defense in depth.
Inventory edit/add silently casts quantity/reorder_level via int() - will 500 on non-numeric input. Wrap in try/except and surface a messages.error instead.
Payslip view: no validation that month/year POST values are present; int(request.POST.get('month')) will TypeError if missing. Add input validation.
seed_data_creation: Test rows created during automated run: Admission 'TEST_Alice Newbie' (promoted to admissions stage), InventoryItem 'TEST_Whiteboard Marker' (qty=3, reorder=10, shows Low Stock), Exam 'TEST_Midterm Math' on 2026-06-15, one Payslip for the HOD user. These remain in the DB; main agent can run `python manage.py seed_demo` to re-seed clean fixtures if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All HOD-side flows verified end-to-end against external preview URL. Nepali calendar fetches from external API and renders correctly (devanagari rows present). Modules dropdown uses Bootstrap-style data-bs-toggle - works with normal page.click on #modulesDropdown. Admin/Student/Teacher dashboards were intentionally not exercised per the review_request (HOD surface only). If retesting, login URL is `/`, POST endpoint is `/doLogin/`, dashboard at `/staff/home/`.
rca of the issue: No bugs encountered; nothing to RCA.
